title: On December 10, Qinhuangdao City Haigang District Mayor Yun Xinsheng led the district’s main leaders to visit Tianhui Group for inspection and investigation
contentHtml: December 10,Qinhuangdao Haigang District Mayor Yun Xinsheng led deputy district mayor Chen Zhanqin, district government office director Wang Jun, and Lingang Logistics Park Secretary Wu Weitao to visit Tianhui Group for inspection and investigation,Participating unitsThey are: the main responsible comrades of the District Government Office, the District Development and Reform Bureau, the Key Project Office, the District Housing and Urban-Rural Development Bureau, the District Natural Resources Planning Bureau (land and planning), the District Water Affairs Bureau, the District Transportation Bureau, Lingang Logistics Park, Yuanmingshan Cultural Tourism Industry Cluster, the main responsible comrades of the Duzhuang Town Party and Government, and the relevant responsible comrades of the Harbor Economic Development Zone.The destination of this inspection is the Tianhui E-commerce Logistics Industrial Park project base. We will learn more about the development of Tianhui Group enterprises, encourage enterprises to have confidence, become bigger and stronger, and coordinate to solve the difficulties and problems of enterprises.
titleZh: 12月10日，秦皇岛市海港区区长贠欣昇带领区主要领导莅临天晖集团视察调研
contentHtmlZh: 12月10日，秦皇岛市海港区区长贠欣昇带领副区长陈占勤、区政府办主任王军、临港物流园区书记吴卫涛莅临天晖集团视察调研，参加单位为：区政府办、区发改局、重点项目办、区住建局、区自然资源规划局（国土、规划）、区水务局、区交通运输局、临港物流园区、圆明山文化旅游产业聚集区主要负责同志，杜庄镇党政主要负责同志，海港经济开发区相关负责同志。此次考察的目的地为天晖电商物流产业园项目基地，详细了解天晖集团企业发展情况，鼓励企业鼓足信心、做大做强，协调解决企业的困难和问题。
